title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - McDonald's India Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Digital Technologies in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Digital Technologies:
McDonald's India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Digital Technologies!
